favouriteCharacter.name: Florian Brand, the Fire Investigator
favouriteCharacter.description:
This is my favourite character in Identity V. I love playing as Florian not only because he is cute and cool, but also because of his tragic backstory, which makes me sympathize with him. I also like his two-faced complexity and moral ambiguity, with his kindness and hidden darkness.
Anyway, who doesn't love a cute Fire Investigator? 🔥

aboutMe.intro: Hi! I'm uJayden, I am a Hong Konger and a university student studying LSGI. I've been playing Identity V for several years from 2018 to now. I am not a professional player that in a top tier of ranking, but I enjoy the game and playing my favourite character, Florian Brand.
aboutMe.gaming: When I'm not playing Identity V, I will do something related to programming, such as coding and maintaining my website, even I am a LSGI student. I also play some games such as Honkai Star Rail, Cities Skylines, Minecraft, Oxygen Not Included and The Sims 4. I look forward to a friendly discussion about IdentityV! About CP: I don't ship nor oppose any CP.
